name: 15Five
tagline: AI-enhanced performance management focused on continuous feedback
description: 15Five is a performance management platform that uses AI to transform how managers and employees communicate about goals, feedback, and development. Its AI features include sentiment analysis of check-ins, automated performance review drafts, engagement survey insights, and coaching recommendations. The platform emphasizes continuous feedback over annual reviews to drive real-time performance improvement.
cons: Less comprehensive than full HCM platforms
